faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Livingston, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Livingston typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and provide detailed quotes before any work begins, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Livingston homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Livingston are completed in 4-8 hours for heat treatments, or may require 2-3 visits over several weeks for chemical applications. Treatment time varies based on your home's size and infestation severity. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Livingston?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-registered products and follow strict safety protocols. Heat treatments are chemical-free, while our targeted pesticide applications require only brief vacating of treated areas, typically 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Livingston, NJ?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Livingston. If bed bugs return within the warranty period, we'll retreat your property at no additional cost.
